vocab.meaning: thay đổi toàn diện diện mạo/thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Many news portals I follow have decided to overhaul the aesthetics to create a more modern and sleek feel.

vocab.meaning: dựa trên/được vận hành bởi thuật toán
vocab.example: The biggest change is how websites have become more algorithm-driven, tailoring the homepage specifically to my browsing history.

vocab.meaning: hệ thống thu phí đọc nội dung
vocab.example: I've noticed that several high-quality journals have recently implemented a paywall, restricting access to premium articles.

vocab.meaning: tối ưu hóa giao diện cho điện thoại
vocab.example: There has been a significant shift toward mobile optimization, making the user experience much smoother on smartphones than on desktops.

vocab.meaning: sự tích hợp trí tuệ nhân tạo
vocab.example: The integration of AI chatbots on shopping sites has made customer support almost instantaneous compared to a few years ago.

vocab.meaning: bị lấp đầy bởi các quảng cáo bật lên
vocab.example: Unfortunately, some previously clean sites have become cluttered with pop-ups, which significantly hinders the reading process.

vocab.meaning: tính năng chế độ tối (màn hình)
vocab.example: Most platforms now offer dark mode functionality, which is a welcome change for people who browse late at night.

vocab.meaning: hợp lý hóa/đơn giản hóa quy trình đăng nhập
vocab.example: They have managed to streamline the login process by allowing users to sign in using their social media credentials.

vocab.meaning: các chiến lược kiếm tiền/thương mại hóa
vocab.example: The changes in monetization strategies mean I see a lot more sponsored content interspersed with regular posts now.

vocab.meaning: dễ bị tổn thương bởi các vụ rò rỉ dữ liệu
vocab.example: With updates in security protocols, websites are becoming less vulnerable to breaches, which gives me more peace of mind.
